case_title: KANE, SIMONE T. vs. CHAMELEON PUBLICATIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANE, SIMONE T. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMELEON PUBLICATIONS, INC.

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KANE, SIMONE T. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMELEON PUBLICATIONS, INC.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
